nasb.text: My God in His lovingkindness will meet me; God will let me look triumphantly upon my foes.

esv.text: My God in his steadfast love  will meet me; God will let me look in triumph on my enemies.

cnv.text: 我的　神必以慈愛迎接我； 　神必叫我看見我的仇敵遭報。

ccb.text: 我的上帝爱我， 祂会帮助我， 让我欣然看见仇敌遭报。

csbs.text: 我慈爱的神将迎接我， 神必使我看到我仇敌的下场。
